title: Blades of Majestica: Restyled
description: A vanilla-ish restyle of the weapons from the texture pack "Blades of Majestica".
body:
This resource/texture pack requires **OPTIFINE** or **CIT RESEWN** to work!
Make sure your configs are set correctly:
_Option/Video Setting/Quality/Custom Item: **ON**_

## What is this pack?
This is a vanilla-ish restyle of the resource pack called "Blades of Majestica".

## How does this pack work?
Take a sword and put it on an anvil and change the name to change its model.
For the full name list, go to https://realm-of-majestica.webflow.io/
